head_subject: fix: archive verification and manifest backfill

changed_files.reason: Backfill the total_capital default so upgraded databases match the V5 config contract.
Normalize HTTP status handling for create, update, status, and generate endpoints.
Ensure default user config rows exist during application startup.
Tighten the TradingPlan default contract and remove implicit model-only assumptions.
Refactor PlanAgent JSON extraction, proposal validation, and manual fallback behavior.
Move create, update, and status transitions onto the shared plan contract layer.
Add the shared V5 plan-domain validation and serialization contract.
Add runtime defaults and ensure logic for total_capital.
Extend tests for PlanAgent parsing edges, manual fallback, and API semantics.
Add API-level verification for defaults, 404 handling, fallback, and success responses.
Unify the stock search and plan API client contracts.
Introduce a shared plan editor for manual create, generate edit, and pending edit.
Centralize generate results, manual fallback state, and page-level errors.
Add shared draft types and a discriminated generate response model.
Consolidate draft builders, payload builders, clone helpers, and local time formatting.
Refactor the page into loading, compare, editor, and manual-fallback states.
Refactor the plan list page to support manual create, pending edit, and explicit errors.
Adapt watchlist search to the normalized stock search array response.
Register the V5 polish entry document and archive directory in the docs index.
Provide the human-readable V5 polish summary and review handoff entry point.
Provide the V5 archive index for Claude and human review.
Map each review finding to its concrete resolution.
Provide a machine-readable manifest of commits, files, and change reasons.
Record automated verification, UI smoke coverage, and verification limits.
